title: Little Chest Items
description: A resource pack that adds small blocks and items into your chests!
body:
![The Little Chest Items mod banner.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5de70420af838ce11f571a359c798b179400c48e_0.webp)

### A resource pack that adds small items to the inside of your chests!
(Too many chests can cause lag, so use with caution!)

Requires [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) + [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) or [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) to work.

---

### Planned Features:
THESE ARE NOT GUARENTEED

- take 5 years to upload a new version (joke trust)
- Random Textures (items vary in chests!)
- Add (separate) alt Chest Resource Pack (MC chest texture kind of goofy)
- Fix inconsistant textures/UVs across all .jems
- Figure out how to get emissives working
- animate inside of ender chests
- different interior texture?

---

For clarity (just in case); This resource pack does NOT update dynamically with items inside your chests. This is for QOL (Quality Of Life), and every chest has a specific texture.

Have a good day :D
